title: blumea viscosa
intro: Blumea viscosa, also known as sticky thistle or stick tight, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Blumea viscosa include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
